title: antidesma helferi
intro: Antidesma helferi, also known as the Velvet Apple, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Antidesma helferi include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
